expectedEnvelopeType.description: Envelope type to wait for per task. Defaults to 'screen.emit'.

taskTimeoutMs.description: Per-task timeout in ms. Defaults to 180000.

taskRetryCount.description: Per-task additional attempts on timeout. Defaults to 0.

failOnAnyTaskError.description: When true, the iteration aborts after the first task failure (remaining tasks marked skipped). Defaults to false (task-level failure isolation).
